LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CAL-PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION - DEFENDANT'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. THE RECORD SHOWS THE PARTIES FORMED A VALID AND ENFORCEABLE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE, AND THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE ENCOMPASSES THE UNDERLYING DISPUTE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT WAIVED ITS' RIGHT TO ARBITRATE THE DISPUTE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE SUBCONTRACT AGREEMENT. (SEE SAINT AGNES MED. CTR. V. PACIFICARE OF CALIF. (2003) 31 CAL.4TH 1187, 1195.) THE PRESENT ACTION IS STAYED UNTIL ARBITRATION IS COMPLETED. (CCP 1281.4.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CAL-PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Arbitration - Defendant's petition to compel arbitration is granted. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. The record shows the parties formed a valid and enforceable agreement to arbitrate, and the arbitration clause encompasses the underlying dispute. Plaintiff has not carried its burden of showing that Defendant waived its' right to arbitrate the dispute in accordance with the Subcontract Agreement. (See Saint Agnes Med. Ctr. v. PacifiCare of Calif. (2003) 31 Cal.4th 1187, 1195.) The present action is stayed until arbitration is completed. (CCP 1281.4.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CAL-PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Arbitration is continued to November 25, 2013, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its opposition by November 13, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
